'''pawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backward|backward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backward|backward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pawate|pawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pawatesher|pawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pawatesherĂ«m|pawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pawatero|pawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pawateshĂ«|pawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pawateshĂ«m|pawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipawatero|gokipawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipawateshĂ«|gokipawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipawateshĂ«m|gokipawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopawankerom|gopawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopawankeshĂ«|gopawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopawankeshĂ«m|gopawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopawankeya|gopawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pawaterom|pawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pawatemu|pawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pawateya|pawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipawaterom|gokipawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipawatemu|gokipawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipawateya|gokipawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pawawate|pawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pawawatesher|pawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pawawatesherĂ«m|pawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pawawatero|pawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pawawateshĂ«|pawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pawawateshĂ«m|pawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipawawatero|gokipawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipawawateshĂ«|gokipawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipawawateshĂ«m|gokipawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopawawankerom|gopawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopawawankeshĂ«|gopawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopawawankeshĂ«m|gopawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopawawankeya|gopawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pawawaterom|pawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pawawatemu|pawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pawawateya|pawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipawawaterom|gokipawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipawawatemu|gokipawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipawawateya|gokipawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠwĂŠte|pĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠwĂŠtesher|pĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠwĂŠtero|pĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠwĂŠtero|gokipĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠwĂŠterom|pĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠwĂŠtemu|pĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠwĂŠteya|pĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠwĂŠterom|gokipĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠwĂŠteya|gokipĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafwafte|pafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafwaftesher|pafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafwaftesherĂ«m|pafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafwaftero|pafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafwafteshĂ«|pafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafwafteshĂ«m|pafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafwaftero|gokipafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafwafteshĂ«|gokipafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafwafteshĂ«m|gokipafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafwafnkerom|gopafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafwafnkeshĂ«|gopafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafwafnkeshĂ«m|gopafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafwafnkeya|gopafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafwafterom|pafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafwaftemu|pafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafwafteya|pafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafwafterom|gokipafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafwaftemu|gokipafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafwafteya|gokipafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
